titleStmt.title: SII 11.9: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 9. (B.K. No. 93 of 1929-30). ON THE SAME PILLAR.

summary.p: This and the previous record appear to refer to the same gift. The genealogies of the king and the donee and the boundaries of the village granted, i.e., Pūvina-Pipparage are here given in detail. And the occasion for making the gift to Gōleya-Bhaṭṭa is stated to be the tulāpurusha ceremony performed by the king who is called Amōghavarsha and Nṛipatuṅga-Vallabha, at the time of a solar eclipse. The date of these two records would therefore be A.D. 862, August 28, Friday which was the day of the only solar eclipse in the year Chitrabhānu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yādavāṁśōtbhava rāThe line commences carved the figure of a drum on either side of which are a few letters much damaged.
śrī kannarasara maga nniru
pamadēvannirupama dē
vara magaṁ jagatuṁ gadēTheanusvāra of tum appears to be engraved on the left side of the letter.
vara(ṁ) magaṁ namōghavaThis superfluousanusvāra is engraved on the left side of the letter ge.
rṣa kauṇḍilya gōtra ka
nnapēṟena magaṁ bēneya
sōmēji bēneya sōmē
jiya magaṁ māraṁmabha
ṭṭara magaṁ gōle
yabhaṭṭaṁ sūryyagraha
ṇadoḷtolāpuruṣavi
rppa tatkāladoḷpāṇigrā
haṇaṁgeydu nṛpatuṅga
vallabhaṁ koṭṭaṁ gōle
ya bhaṭṭaṁgge bappūroḍi
mmadēśē va
ṭa ballana pegge
māramma kuṇḍige
sageyuvaṁ paṁcca
saḍedaṁ dēgiga gi
llana dharmma .

pūvina pipparage ya nālku
deseya polemēreyaṁ na
ḍusariyāgi naḍaduṁ
koṭṭar . mūḍaṇa desaya
varāha keṟeyaṁ mūḍaṇapaḷḷa
Adaṟa teṅkaṇa dese maṇḍageṟe
gūṭṭaṁ tāṟiyaṁ ko rttūgu
viya keṟe
goṭṭaṁ Ermmātiṭṭiya dati
satrāṅgaḷattaṁ Oḍegeṟeya
teṅkaṇaṁ kalguṇḍaṁ Uñcage
ṟeyaṁ guṭṭaṁ pu
ṇusigeteṅkaṇa paḷḷaṁ
sogillapaḷḷave guḍḍe
baḍagaṇaduḍḍi meṭṭuṁgu
ḍḍe boḷgeṟeguḍḍe .svadettaṁTheda is inserted in a small siśe below the line.
pparadattaṁ va yō hā(va)rētti
vasundarīṁ ṣaṭṭivariṣa
sahasṛṇi viṭṭāyaṁ jā
yatē krimmi . sāsira kāvi
leyu sāsira parvvaruṁ
koṁndā lōkake sālguṁ .
AṅgavveperggaḍegivellaLines 45 to 48 are
nikiḍisade I dharmmama
pregaḍegakṣiḷa
sāsirada gāmuṇḍarandati .
Digital edition of SII 11.9 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
